description: Mondoir is a contemporary art platform and gallery website for browsing, buying, valuing, and sourcing artworks, and for artist submissions through its Partner Studio program. It also publishes AI-facing content and programmatic endpoints on the same domain.
summary: Mondoir exposes an OAuth-protected OpenAPI-described HTTP API at `https://mondoir.art` and an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mondoir.art/mcp`; no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
